name: Demo A — happy path (conversational entry → image phase → approval gate)
description: Single-product happy path used for the live demo. Verifies: conversational product entry routes through prepare_dataset, the image phase runs end-to-end via the deployed MCP, the agent reads pipeline evaluation_results, posts a completion message after wait_for_job returns, surfaces a review card, and stops at the approval gate (does NOT call batch_generate(mode='full')). Costs ~$0.10 per run (one image gen) and takes ~6 min.

parts.text:
I want to try out a single product before doing a full catalog. Add this to your dataset and generate one starting-frame image — 16:9, English. Pause before video.

- product_id: EVAL-DEMO-001
- product_name: Cozy Knit Reusable Shopping Tote Bag
- country: United States
- language: English
- company_name: Demo Co
- image_url: https://s.alicdn.com/@sc04/kf/H032f9dfef6ba4d12b6bce93c52d0bd70E.jpg?avif=close&webp=close
